rationale: Scope fence holds: `git show --name-only ce9f5395` is exactly the 14 planned files under internal/panel|complete|bead, one commit, no ADR/doc/skill edits, no CLI verb touched. AC5 fixture classification checked by diffing 1906e39e..ce9f5395 per-file: the ONE struct-comparison fix (panel_test.go ~254, TestPanelGateDecision_ConfigDefaultDoesNotAlterDecision) replaces `got != want` with `got.Action != want.Action || got.Message != want.Message` — correct and sufficient, since the test only varies the config-free ReviewerCountNote input and never touches refutations, so Action+Message parity is the right (and only meaningful) equality check; `AppliedRefutations` is rightly excluded from the comparison as it's the new field being introduced. Verified no other Decision{...} literal in gate.go carries AppliedRefutations except the single leg-10 Allow return (gate.go:299), and the unrelated `r == want` in panel_gate_layout_test.go:64 (containsRoot) is a string comparison, not a Decision comparison. The 12 panelGate test-caller updates (6 in panel_advisory_test.go, 4 in panel_gate_e2e_test.go, 2 in panel_gate_layout_test.go) plus the 1 prod site (complete.go:383) are the ONLY panelGate(...) call sites in the tree (grep-confirmed); diffing each file against the parent commit shows the changes are byte-for-byte `reg, err :=` -> `reg, _, err :=` (or `_, err :=` -> `_, _, err :=`) with zero other line changes in those touched lines -- pure return-arity, no outcome change. Build, gofmt, vet all clean; targeted and full package tests (panel/complete/bead/cmd/mindspec) pass, including -race, in an isolated /tmp archive of ce9f5395.

findings.description: git show --name-only ce9f5395 lists exactly the 14 planned files (internal/bead/{bdcli.go,bdcli_test.go}, internal/complete/{complete.go,complete_test.go,panel_advisory.go,panel_advisory_test.go,panel_gate_e2e_test.go,panel_gate_layout_test.go,panel_refuted_test.go}, internal/panel/{gate.go,panel.go,panel_test.go,refutation_test.go,tally.go}), single commit, no ADR/doc/skill files, no cmd/ changes.

Decision struct-comparison fix at panel_test.go line 257 compares Action+Message field-wise; confirmed via `grep -n 'Decision{' internal/panel/gate.go` that the leg-10 Allow at gate.go:299 is the only Decision literal populating AppliedRefutations, so the fixed comparison's exclusion of that field is correct and does not mask a real regression.

Diffed 1906e39e..ce9f5395 for panel_advisory_test.go, panel_gate_e2e_test.go, panel_gate_layout_test.go, panel_test.go individually: the only lines that changed are the 12 mechanical panelGate call-site arity updates plus the single Decision-comparison fix (with its explanatory comment) -- no incidental behavior or assertion changes rode along.

Empirical: go build ./..., gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal (empty), go vet ./internal/panel ./internal/complete ./internal/bead all clean in an isolated /tmp archive; go test ./internal/panel ./internal/complete ./internal/bead ./cmd/mindspec and go test -race on panel/complete/bead all pass.
